data.name: Hentai Tales: Sex Institute
data.detailed_description:
遊戲玩法

一邊完成棘手的謎題，一邊享受感性的故事！
使用板上的所有方塊依序連接數字
完成拼圖後，您將解鎖性感的新形象和故事的下一部分！
你能完成所有謎題並見到所有女孩嗎？

故事背景

你是個有野心的年輕人，就讀於著名的性學院。
該研究所研究性的各個方面，從不同的姿勢到帶來最大快樂的技巧。
它的建立是為了讓學生學習性知識並磨練他們的技能。
那裡會發生什麼事？

人物

Akemiyu：

Akemiyu 是性學院的女研究生。她有一頭飄逸的棕色長髮，給人一種優雅的感覺。
由於她的美麗和聰明，她也很受男性歡迎。

Rikasa：

Rikasa，一頭甜美有彈性的藍色頭髮，完美地襯托出她的臉型。
人們經常看到她在課堂上微笑或咯咯地笑，因為她非常喜歡每天與不同的伴侶學習性知識和探索新的姿勢。

MiyaNatsume:

MiyaNatsume不像Akemiyu或Rikasa那樣外向或輕浮，但有一種不屈的決心來掌握性的各個方面。
她比較擅長性SM。她扮演主角。

特徵

  • 20 美麗女孩的性感和色情圖片。
  • 一個關於具有獨特個性的女孩的奇幻色情故事。
  • 如果你只是想享受故事的樂趣，你可以跳過謎題。 （拼圖過程中按 Enter 鍵）。
  • CG 畫廊模式。 （完成拼圖後點擊CG旁邊的左右按鈕）。

data.name: Hentai Tales: Sex Institute
data.detailed_description:
GamePlay

Enjoy a sensual story while completing tricky puzzles!
Connect the numbers sequentially, using all of the squares on the board.
After completing a puzzle, you will unlock a sexy new image and the next part of the story!
Can you complete every puzzle and meet all of the girls?!

Story Background

You are an abitious young man who enrolled in a prestigious sex institute.
The institute studies all aspects of sex, from different positions to techniques that bring maximum pleasure.
It was established as a place where students can learn about sex and hone their skills.
What will happen there?

Characters

Akemiyu:

Akemiyu is one of the female graduate students at the Sex Institute. She has long, flowing brown hair, which gives her an air of elegance.
She is also quite popular among the male students due to her beauty and intelligence.

Rikasa:

Rikasa is a shy sweet girl, with blue hair that frames her face perfectly.
She's often seen smiling or giggling while in class because of how much she enjoys learning about sex and exploring new positions with different partners every day.

MiyaNatsume:

Miya is not as outgoing or flirty as Akemiyu or Rikasa but has an unyielding determination to master every aspect of sex.
She enjoys S&M and takes a commanding role during sex.

Features

  • 20 sexy and erotic images of beautiful girls.
  • A fantastical erotic story with girls who have unique personalities.
  • You can skip the puzzles if you just want to enjoy the story. (Press Enter during a puzzle).
  • CG Gallery mode. (Click the left and right buttons next to the CG after completing a puzzle).
